name: Muckamuck
description: Muckamuck sniper rifles are built for hard-hitting, accurate shots, trading fire rate and recoil control for stronger damage and reliable precision. Lower rarities can be bolt-action, and depending on parts they use either a 7-round cylinder or a 7- to 8-round box magazine. They fill much the same role as the Jakobs Chinook line.
notes: The Gearbox Muckamuck is only included with the Premiere Club pre-order bonus. The standard Muckamuck can drop from most suitable loot sources.
